creator: segin2005@gmail.com
text:
Patch to update port x11/deskpaint to version 3.1. Reattempt at PR 159958.

This time 'make patch' doesn't fail.

Fix: 

cd /usr/ports/x11
patch < deskpaint.patch.txt
cd deskpaint
make install
pkg_info 'deskpaint-*' | head -n 1
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/x11/deskpaint
make install
pkg_info 'deskpaint-*' | head -n 1
